column1: # frequently_errors.tsv -- curated catalog of recurring FM / class-method / codegen
# mistakes and their remedies. Read by sap-gen-abap (Step 1.5f) to steer generation
# away from known traps. This file is TIER 3 (lowest precedence) of the loop.
# Precedence at read time (highest wins on conflict; union otherwise; MUTE suppresses):
#   OBJECT_TYPE     FM | METHOD | BAPI | STMT | AUTHZ   (STMT = general rule, OBJECT_NAME=*)
#   OBJECT_NAME     FM name, CLASS name, auth object, or * for a statement-level rule
#   CONTEXT         parameter / method / clause / sub-context (blank if whole object)
#   ERROR_CLASS     short machine code for the trap family
#   RELEASE         SAP_BASIS release the trap applies to (ALL | 7.52 | ...)
#   CORRECT_PATTERN the remedy to emit instead (the load-bearing field)
#   SEVERITY        ACTIVATION | ATC_P1 | ATC_P2 | ATC_P3 | RUNTIME
#   RULE_REF        cross-ref to abap_code_quality_rules.md (e.g. section 24) or other
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are skipped. Cell separator is TAB.

column6: Blank MATNR relying on internal numbering
column7: Supply explicit MATNR; verify external numbering allowed (T134-NUMKE / NRIV range) before assigning
column11: No internal numbering; HALB external on S4D 1909 (NUMKE=13), FERT/HAWA/ROH internal-only -> M3 Enter material number

column7: Pre-declare DATA ls_ret TYPE bapiret2 and pass by name
column11: DATA(...) not possible in this position on 7.52, then cascading unknown errors

column6: mrp_view = X with no MARC-DISMM supplied
column7: Default mrp_type (DISMM) to ND when blank, or omit the MRP view

column11: AI training data wrongly flattens onto BAPI_MARA; silent data loss

column7: Use PURCHASE_VIEW (BAPIMATHEAD), OLD_MAT_NO (BAPI_MARA); NET_WEIGHT on BAPI_MARA
column11: Wrong BAPI struct field names observed run #4

column6: Passing p_file TYPE rlgrap-filename to formal STRING
column7: Adapter: DATA(lv_fn) = CONV string( p_file ); pass lv_fn
column11: Survives syntax+activation; only ATC catches CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ILLEGAL_TYPE

column7: Same CONV string( ) adapter as GUI_UPLOAD

column6: Inline DATA() in CHANGING; table-expr lt_files[ 1 ]-filename
column7: Pre-declare file_table; READ TABLE INTO ls; reference ls-filename
column11: 7.52 strict mode rejects inline DATA() and table expressions in this position

column6: Inline DATA() inside CALL FUNCTION IMPORTING
column7: Pre-declare the receiver, pass by name
column11: Cascading X unknown errors follow on 7.52

column6: IMPORTING it TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF <dbtab> in a method signature
column7: Declare a TYPES alias once and reference it in every signature

column6: SELECT INTO TABLE @DATA(lt) then pass lt to a named-type IMPORTING
column7: Declare lt with the named table-type alias before the SELECT
column11: Anonymous table type incompatible with named parameter

column7: Assign meth( ) to a variable first, then PERFORM USING the variable
column11: No method can be specified in the current position on 7.52

column7: Route via a message class: MESSAGE eNNN(zXXX) WITH ...
column11: Literal strings are not translatable -> ATC P2 every time

column7: Use real fields ACTVT and BEGRU (resolve via USOBT_C / TOBJ / SU21)
column11: Invented field passes activation but fails ATC AUT 0302

column7: Use real fields ACTVT and WERKS

column6: Referencing a text-symbol (tNN) absent from the text_elements file
column7: Every (tNN) / symbol referenced must exist in *.text_elements.txt; emit it
column11: Undefined (t02) observed; ATC P3 + activation risk

column7: Use PROGDIR/TRDIR/TADIR for metadata; READ REPORT / RPY_PROGRAM_READ for source; SE16N for rows
column11: ASSIGN CASTING dump in SAPLSDTX -- row width exceeds cap; guarded in sap_rfc_lib.ps1

column6: SPLIT lv_line AT sep INTO ... ls_rec-ntgew (QUAN/CURR/DEC/packed DDIC target)
column7: SPLIT into an all-CHARACTER staging struct, then MOVE field-by-field into the typed target (numeric conversion happens on the assignment)
column11: Confirmed live 2026-06-07 MaterialUpload CN *56 (ZMMRMAT056*) on S/4HANA 1909; NTGEW (net weight) is QUAN. SPLIT INTO targets must be C/N/D/T/STRING
